title: Create: Chicken Nuggets
description: An extension of create that allows you to make chicken nuggets, and dino chicken nuggets
body:
Create Chicken Nuggets utilizes Create's assembly line infrastructure to allow the creation of chicken nuggets, and dinosaur chicken nuggets. ## The Shorthand Explanation By grinding up chicken for the filling, and bread for the nugget breading, you can combine the byproducts to make chicken nuggets of various shapes. You can then cook or better yet smoke the nuggets (imagine it's an early days air frying technique), with each step of processing making the nuggets better for you. You can also find, or in the case of the pterodactyl, make molds to mold your chicken filling into dinosaur shapes to create dinosaur chicken nuggets. These, when smoked, will give special effects for a brief period of time, at the cost of not being as good for your hunger compared to the normal nugget. ## Additional details (Spoiler tagged)
Well Done Dinosaur effects * Pterodactyl: Gives levitation 2 for 7.5 seconds, and Slow falling 2 for 15 seconds. * Stegosaurus: Gives the Stego Spine effect, granting some amount of thorns to the user for 30 seconds. * Sauropod: Gives the Stego Stretch effect, increasing the user's interaction range for 30 seconds. * T-Rex: Gives the T-Rex Terror effect, increasing the user's strength dramatically, while decreasing their interaction range. * Triceratops: Gives the Trampling Tricera effect, giving a moderate strength effect and a strong speed boost.
